tasks.label: 🚀 Start Backend
args: cd backend && ([ ! -d venv ] && python3 -m venv venv || true) && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt -q && python main.py
cd backend && (if not exist venv python -m venv venv) && venv\Scripts\activate && pip install -r requirements.txt -q && python main.py

tasks.label: 🌐 Start Frontend
args: cd frontend && ([ ! -d node_modules ] && npm install || true) && npm run dev
cd frontend && (if not exist node_modules npm install) && npm run dev

tasks.label: 📦 Install All Dependencies
args: cd backend && python3 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && echo '✅ Backend deps installed' && cd ../frontend && npm install && echo '✅ Frontend deps installed'
cd backend && python -m venv venv && venv\Scripts\activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && echo Backend deps installed && cd ..\frontend && npm install && echo Frontend deps installed

tasks.label: 🗑️ Reset Database
args: rm -f backend/freelanceos.db && echo '✅ Database reset — restart backend to re-seed with demo data'
del /f backend\freelanceos.db && echo Database reset - restart backend to re-seed
